bridge-type.label: Bosch Thermotechnology Account
bridge-type.description: Represents one SingleKey ID (Bosch/Buderus) login. After adding this bridge, open the URL shown in the "authUrl" configuration parameter in a browser, log in, then paste the resulting redirect URL into the "pasteAuthorizationRedirectUrl" configuration parameter to complete authorization. See ADR-002 for the full flow.

parameter.name: authUrl
parameter.label: Authorization URL
parameter.description: Automatically filled in during initialization. Open this URL in a browser and log in with your Bosch/Buderus account. Empty once authorization is complete.

parameter.name: pasteAuthorizationRedirectUrl
parameter.label: Authorization Redirect URL
parameter.description: One-time setup only: paste the full redirect URL from your browser's address bar here after logging in at SingleKey ID. The value is consumed immediately and never stored.

bridge-type.label: Bosch Thermotechnology Gateway
bridge-type.description: A single Bosch/Buderus gateway, reachable via the PointT cloud API. Depending on its hardware class, child things (heat pump, PV, pool, RAC unit, ventilation zone, multi-zone thermostats, energy monitoring, water softener) are discovered underneath once this bridge is online - see ADR-005/ADR-006.

parameter.name: gatewayId
parameter.label: Gateway ID
parameter.description: The gateway id assigned by the PointT API. Filled in automatically by discovery.

parameter.name: refreshInterval
parameter.label: Refresh Interval
parameter.description: Interval the gateway's own system resources are polled, in seconds.

thing-type.label: Bosch Thermotechnology Heat Pump
thing-type.description: Heating circuits, domestic hot water circuits, and heat sources of one Bosch/Buderus heat pump or boiler. Channel groups are added dynamically per discovered circuit - see HeatpumpHandler.

parameter.name: gatewayId
parameter.label: Gateway ID
parameter.description: The gateway id this heat pump belongs to. Filled in automatically by discovery.

parameter.name: refreshInterval
parameter.label: Refresh Interval
parameter.description: Interval the heat pump's resources are polled, in seconds.

thing-type.label: Bosch Thermotechnology Photovoltaic
thing-type.description: Photovoltaic inverter status and solar-thermal collector readings of one gateway. Grouped in one thing per team decision, even though PV (electricity) and solar-thermal (hot water) are technically distinct systems - kept as two separately labeled channel groups below so they are not conflated in the UI.

parameter.name: gatewayId
parameter.label: Gateway ID
parameter.description: The gateway id this PV/solar-thermal system belongs to. Filled in automatically by discovery.

thing-type.label: Bosch Thermotechnology Pool
thing-type.description: Pool heating status of one gateway.

parameter.name: gatewayId
parameter.label: Gateway ID
parameter.description: The gateway id this pool belongs to. Filled in automatically by discovery.

thing-type.label: Bosch Thermotechnology Ventilation Zone
thing-type.description: One HRV ventilation zone of a gateway.

parameter.name: gatewayId
parameter.label: Gateway ID
parameter.description: The gateway id this ventilation zone belongs to. Filled in automatically by discovery.

parameter.name: gatewayId
parameter.label: Gateway ID
parameter.description: The gateway id this zone thermostat belongs to. Filled in automatically by discovery.

parameter.name: zoneId
parameter.label: Zone ID
parameter.description: The zone number (e.g. "1" for zone1) as returned by zones/list. Filled in automatically by discovery.

thing-type.label: Bosch Thermotechnology Energy Monitoring
thing-type.description: Historical energy-monitoring recordings of one gateway's heat source(s).

parameter.name: gatewayId
parameter.label: Gateway ID
parameter.description: The gateway id this energy monitoring belongs to. Filled in automatically by discovery.

parameter.name: gatewayId
parameter.label: Gateway ID
parameter.description: The gateway id this AC unit belongs to. Filled in automatically by discovery.

thing-type.label: Bosch Thermotechnology Water Softener
thing-type.description: One water softener. Not yet functional - see ADR-006: the resource path for this device class is unconfirmed.

parameter.name: gatewayId
parameter.label: Gateway ID
parameter.description: The gateway id this water softener belongs to. Filled in automatically by discovery.

channel-type.label: Outdoor Temperature
channel-type.description: Outdoor temperature reported by the gateway (read-only).

channel-type.label: Away Mode
channel-type.description: Enables or disables away mode for the whole gateway.

channel-type.label: Silent Mode
channel-type.description: Enables or disables silent (noise-reduced) mode for the whole gateway.

channel-type.label: Season Optimizer Mode
channel-type.description: Raw season optimizer mode reported/expected by the gateway. TODO ($Dev): confirm the exact enumeration of values against a live gateway - currently passed through as-is, analogous to heat-source-ch-status.

channel-type.label: Active Holiday Mode
channel-type.description: Raw summary of the currently active holiday mode, as reported by holidayMode/activeModes. Read-only by design - creating/editing/deleting holiday modes is deliberately not modeled as a channel, see ADR-005.

channel-type.label: Manual Room Setpoint
channel-type.description: Manual room setpoint of this heating circuit.

channel-type.label: DHW Charge Duration
channel-type.description: Domestic hot water single-charge duration of this DHW circuit.

channel-type.label: DHW Single Charge Setpoint
channel-type.description: Domestic hot water single-charge temperature setpoint of this DHW circuit.

channel-type.label: DHW Operation Mode
channel-type.description: Domestic hot water operation mode of this DHW circuit. The PointT API itself reports/expects the String values "Off"/"Eco+"/"Eco"/"Comfort"/"Auto" - the numeric codes below are a binding-internal mapping onto those Strings, see HeatpumpHandler.

channel-type.label: Heat Source CH Status
channel-type.description: Raw central heating status reported by the heat source. TODO: confirm the exact value shape (boolean, numeric code, or string) against a live gateway - currently passed through as-is.

channel-type.label: Actual Supply Temperature
channel-type.description: Actual supply (flow) temperature of the heat source.

channel-type.label: Return Temperature
channel-type.description: Return temperature of the heat source.

channel-type.label: Number Of Starts
channel-type.description: Number of times the heat source has started.

channel-type.label: Total Working Time
channel-type.description: Total working time of the heat source. TODO: confirm the reported unit against a live gateway - currently assumed to be hours.

channel-type.label: Active Notifications
channel-type.description: Raw active notifications/faults reported by the gateway, as a JSON string. TODO: confirm the exact response shape against a live gateway and consider splitting into dedicated channels (e.g. a trigger channel per fault) once known.

channel-type.label: DHW Instant Charge
channel-type.description: Starts or stops a domestic hot water instant charge of this DHW circuit.

channel-type.label: DHW Reduce Temperature On Alarm
channel-type.description: Reduces the domestic hot water temperature when an alarm is active.

channel-type.label: PV Enabled
channel-type.description: Enables or disables photovoltaic integration.

channel-type.label: PV Inverter Info
channel-type.description: Raw photovoltaic inverter information, as a JSON string. TODO ($Dev): confirm the exact response shape against a live gateway and consider splitting into dedicated channels once known.

channel-type.label: Solar Collector Temperature
channel-type.description: Solar-thermal collector temperature (read-only).

channel-type.label: Solar Yield
channel-type.description: Solar-thermal yield (read-only).

channel-type.label: Pool Enabled
channel-type.description: Enables or disables pool heating.

channel-type.label: Pool Setpoint Temperature
channel-type.description: Pool water temperature setpoint.

channel-type.label: Pool Current Temperature
channel-type.description: Current pool water temperature (read-only).

channel-type.label: Ventilation Operation Mode
channel-type.description: Raw ventilation operation mode reported/expected by the gateway. TODO ($Dev): confirm the exact enumeration of values against a live gateway.

channel-type.label: Ventilation Filter Remaining Time
channel-type.description: Remaining filter run time before replacement is due (read-only).

channel-type.label: Zone Manual Room Setpoint
channel-type.description: Manual room setpoint of this zone thermostat. TODO ($Dev): the underlying resource path (zones/zone{n}/{heatCoolMode}/manualRoomSetpoint) is parameterized by a heat/cool mode segment - ZoneThermostatHandler currently assumes "heat" as the default; confirm against a live gateway whether "cool" needs its own channel.

channel-type.label: Zone Average Current Temperature
channel-type.description: Average current room temperature of this zone thermostat (read-only).

channel-type.label: Zone Child Lock
channel-type.description: Enables or disables the child lock of this zone thermostat.

channel-type.label: Actual Central Heating Power
channel-type.description: Actual central heating power. TODO ($Dev): confirm whether this resource returns a single scalar or a time series (YRecording, per myapp-api-analysis.md) against a live gateway - see the thing-type description.

channel-type.label: Actual DHW Power
channel-type.description: Actual domestic hot water power. Same time-series caveat as actual-ch-power.

channel-type.label: Total Consumed Energy
channel-type.description: Total consumed energy of the heat source. Same time-series caveat as actual-ch-power.

channel-type.label: AC Operation Mode
channel-type.description: Raw RAC operation mode reported/expected by the gateway. TODO ($Dev): confirm the exact enumeration of values against a live gateway.

channel-type.label: AC Fan Speed
channel-type.description: Raw RAC fan speed reported/expected by the gateway. TODO ($Dev): confirm the exact enumeration of values against a live gateway.

channel-type.label: AC Temperature Setpoint
channel-type.description: RAC temperature setpoint.
